cover.era_chip: 朝鮮 前期 · 士林
cover.subtitle:
서원과 향약을 딛고,
동·서로 갈라섰다.
cover.imagePrompt: Mid-16th century Korean illustration. TWO groups of Korean scholars in white scholarly robes and black gat (horsehair hats) seated facing each other across an open seowon (Confucian academy) courtyard, low writing desks between them. One group on left, one on right, formal posture, brush stands on desks. Pine trees and tile-roofed pavilions in background. Composition: symmetrical confrontation, scholarly debate. Color: ink-black + hanji beige + soft jade green pine + muted crimson rank detail. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

timeline.text: 이황 건의로 소수서원 사액. 전국 확산.

outro.tip_headline:
"심의겸 = 서인 / 김효원 = 동인"
인물과 붕당을 묶어라.
outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 1575년 이조전랑 임명 다툼이 분당의 직접 계기임을 묻는다. 이조전랑은 정5~6품이지만 후임 추천권이 핵심. 동인은 1589 기축옥사 처리로 남인·북인으로 다시 분화.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: two stylized scholar-hat (gat) silhouettes facing each other in mirror symmetry, simple ink-line. RIGHT: a small seowon pavilion silhouette suggesting Confucian academy. Cream #F2EDE3 base + ink-black outline + soft jade #047857 accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.
